spec_match.rationale: Demonstrates zoom in @keyframes and compares it directly to transform scale.

interactive.rationale: Features animation selection buttons, a duration slider, and a trigger button with visual feedback.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Properly aligned with the milestone descriptions showing keyframe support.

edge_cases.rationale: Includes compatibility probing and measures layout displacement using live coordinates during animation.

references.rationale: Cites ChromeStatus and MDN reference documentation.

design_system.rationale: Strictly follows design system parameters and correct button active coloring.

summary: A highly interactive comparative showcase demonstrating @keyframes zoom support, featuring real-time layout coordinate measurements.
